name: Andy Newmark
abstract: Andrew Newmark (born July 14, 1950) is an American session drummer who was a member of Sly and the Family Stone and has played with George Harrison, John Lennon, Pink Floyd, David Bowie, Carly Simon, Steve Winwood, Ron Wood and Roxy Music. Sly Stone, in his memoir Thank You (Falettinme Be Mice Elf Agin), called Newmark the best drummer h…

An Evening with Jon Lucien, featuring Special Guests Stanley Turrentine and George Benson

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: Andy Newmark, great drummer, was playing with Bryan Ferry... So I played this conga part... And Andy Newmark is like, “What the fu—“ — but it came off.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023
